metadata.note: Archetype A2 (anchor == subject), primary_target=null. Measures 91 titles/180d across 39 publishers with ZERO overlap against serbia_government_legitimacy. Dominant instance is the Kushner/Trump-family-linked Sazan-Vlora resort and the Albanian protest movement against it; Fincantieri's shipbuilding deal is the secondary strand. 'Trump' is EXCLUDED per hard rule 4 (third-party leader) even though it appears in most headlines -- 'resort' and 'Kushner' already carry those titles. Kushner/Jared are NOT third-party leaders here: the foreign investor is a principal party to a foreign-capital phenomenon, i.e. Pillar 1. 'pipeline' is excluded despite the Trump-linked Bosnia gas-pipeline strand, because it collides with the Serbia gasovod sabotage story owned by the sibling atomic; that leaves the Bosnia strand largely unreachable, which is accepted rather than bought with cross-atomic leak. 'resort' was checked against the word-START matcher: 'resorted' returns 0 false positives in this centroid. Latin-script aliases are kept out of it/es/fr (flatten_aliases ignores detected_language, so they would match English titles through the weaker substring path); those languages carry accented forms that cannot collide.
